description_long: This is a modern, semi-automatic rifle with a modular design, featuring a matte tan finish across its body. The rifle has a prominent handguard with multiple slots for accessory attachments, a full-length Picatinny rail on top, and a skeletonized adjustable stock for ergonomic support. The pistol grip is textured for improved handling, and the magazine is a detachable box type, inserted just ahead of the trigger guard. The barrel is medium-length and capped with a muzzle brake, designed to reduce recoil and muzzle rise. The overall construction suggests a blend of metal and polymer materials, typical of contemporary tactical rifles.
description: A tan, modular semi-automatic rifle with a skeletonized adjustable stock, detachable box magazine, and a muzzle brake on a medium-length barrel.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the skeletonized stock, pistol grip, handguard, and magazine.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel's end, muzzle brake, and the narrow profile of the handguard.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the full profile with clear visibility of the stock, grip, and magazine.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the stock and the alignment of the receiver and barrel.
